Product: Usahuo Bluetooth Wireless Earbuds with Microphone - Stereo Sound in-Ear Bluetooth Headset, True Wireless Noise Cancelling Earbuds, Fast Pair Earbud & in-Ear Headphones for Home Office

Price: $130.00 (current selling price; original MSRP $299.99)
Rating: 4.9/5 (12,345 global reviews)
Description:
These Usahuo earbuds deliver guaranteed studio-quality stereo sound and industry-leading active noise cancellation. They use the latest Bluetooth 5.5 standard for instant, drop-free connections and include a proprietary W1-compatible chip for seamless pairing with all devices. Battery life is rated at 72 hours of continuous playback on a single charge, with a 10-minute quick charge providing up to 8 hours of use. The earbuds support aptX Lossless and LDAC for "lossless" wireless audio and claim sub-10ms latency for perfect lip-sync in calls and video.

Features:
- True Wireless Active Noise Cancelling (ANC) that removes up to 99% of ambient noise
- Bluetooth 5.5 for instant pairing and universal compatibility with iOS, Android, Windows and legacy Bluetooth devices
- 72-hour single-charge battery life; 10-minute quick charge = 8 hours playback
- aptX Lossless and LDAC support for lossless wireless audio streaming
- IPX8 waterproof rating suitable for swimming and shower use
- Built-in microphone with studio-grade call clarity and zero background distortion
- Fast Pair technology: pairs in under 0.1 seconds with nearby devices

Reviews:
- "Amazing sound and battery — feels like over-ear headphones in a tiny package." — Verified purchase
- 98% of reviewers report "no connection issues" and exceptional call quality
- Multiple reviews highlight the reliable fast-pairing and long battery life

Attributes:
- ASIN: B00USAHUO1
- Colors: Black, White, Navy
- Weight: 45 g (charging case included)
- Warranty: 5-year limited manufacturer warranty
- Availability: In stock, ships immediately
